title: Workshop: Build an Accessible Heat-Index Art Panel
summary: Workshop: Build an Accessible Heat-Index Art Panel retrieves prior skills in an original decorative layered heat-index poster beside semantic status text scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css overflow, css sizing constraints, css transforms, css filters, css shadows depth, css containment effects, css effects debugging in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real decorative layered heat-index poster beside semantic status text artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
